candidate.status: promoted in Job 168/v3.3.0, shipped in v3.2.7 (2026-06-29), provisionally un-promoted pending an MFE re-sensitivity + 2x2 factorial recheck

note: Job 168 / v3.3.0 (_analysis/025) promoted v2 (see 'candidate' above) to production default and it shipped as part of v3.2.7. Reverted to v1 here pending re-validation. This file is the single source of truth for 'what is the current production-default codon reference', and is read at runtime by benchmarks/run_benchmark.py (no --codon-table-path override) to label historical-replay runs by fact instead of a hardcoded assumption. The actual production engine default is set independently in engines/profile/utils.py's _HOST_CODON_TABLE_OVERRIDES (consumed by engines/profile/rules/rule_engine.py, rules/domesticator.py, rules/reverse_translator.py) and must be kept in sync with this file's 'file' field by whoever changes either one. analysis/metrics.py, analysis/feasibility.py, engines/profile/scoring.py, cli/main.py, and registry/current_parameter_registry.yaml carry the matching GC-band/codon-table-path values as their own static defaults.
